TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ian_Khama, title = Ian_Khama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ian_Khama} }

S.FORM: Ian Khama I 1953 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 27 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ian Khama, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Botswana anini i ci Ian Khama, patirengan a romi'ad i 2008 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ian kńßama i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ian kńßama, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vo~utswana anini i ¶i ian kńßama, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Ian Khama I 1953 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 27 a romi'ad masofoc ci Ian Khama, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Botswana anini i ci Ian Khama, patirengan a romi'ad i 2008 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
